case_title: RISHI VARMA VS. FIDELITY NATIONAL HOME WARRANTY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-23-2018 BY VISITING JUDGE CECILIA CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DARIA CHUGUNOVA, VENDOR RELATION MANAGEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA CASTELLANOS; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL HOME WARRANTY COMPANY
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL HOME WARRANTY COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-11-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL HOME WARRANTY COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VARMA, RISHI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL HOME WARRANTY COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,105.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY VARMA, RISHI AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL HOME WARRANTY COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
